log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Bandit Captain --- HP: 65/65 | AC: 15
REASONING: Moving toward Fire Genasi — Bardic Musician (40ft away). Dashing.
MOVEMENT: Moves toward Fire Genasi — Bardic Musician.
ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.
REASONING: Fireball on 1 targets!
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 14 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Fire Genasi — Bardic Musician: SUCCESS. 16 damage (half).
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
REASONING: Can't reach melee (70ft). Javelin at Fire Genasi — Bardic Musician.
→ Javelin: [d20:14+6=20 vs AC 14] HIT! 10 damage. Fire Genasi — Bardic Musician HP: 41/67
REASONING: Can't reach melee (75ft). Javelin at Fire Genasi — Bardic Musician.
→ Javelin: [d20:13+6=19 vs AC 14] HIT! 11 damage. Fire Genasi — Bardic Musician HP: 30/67
REASONING: Can't reach melee (50ft). Light Crossbow at Fire Genasi — Bardic Musician.
→ Light Crossbow: [d20:20+3=23 vs AC 14] CRITICAL HIT! 5 damage. Fire Genasi — Bardic Musician HP: 25/67
REASONING: Can't reach melee (60ft). Light Crossbow at Fire Genasi — Bardic Musician.
→ Light Crossbow: [d20:13+3=16 vs AC 14] HIT! 2 damage. Fire Genasi — Bardic Musician HP: 23/67
REASONING: Can't reach melee (45ft). Light Crossbow at Fire Genasi — Bardic Musician.
→ Light Crossbow: [d20:13+3=16 vs AC 14] HIT! 2 damage. Fire Genasi — Bardic Musician HP: 21/67
REASONING: Can't reach melee (55ft). Light Crossbow at Fire Genasi — Bardic Musician.
→ Light Crossbow: [d20:11+3=14 vs AC 14] HIT! 2 damage. Fire Genasi — Bardic Musician HP: 19/67
--- Fire Genasi — Bardic Musician --- HP: 19/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 8 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Bandit Captain: WIS save [d20:4+2=6 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Bandit: WIS save [d20:2+0=2 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Bandit: WIS save [d20:9+0=9 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Bandit: WIS save [d20:9+0=9 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Bandit: WIS save [d20:18+0=18 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Mage: WIS save [d20:8+4=12 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:7+-2=5 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:1+-2=-1 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 7/8 targets affected.
